scenarios.description: children() re-filters when cachedChildren userData exists but modCount mismatches
scenarios.precondition: Element has one Element child and userData cache set with wrong modCount
scenarios.expectedResult: children() returns fresh filtered list of the child after detecting stale cache
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children stale cache triggers re-filter

scenarios.description: children() handles multiple element children plus userData present before first call
scenarios.precondition: Element has two Element children; attributes().userData() manually pre-populated (no cache entries)
scenarios.expectedResult: children() returns two element children in insertion order
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children with multiple element children and pre-existing userData
// pre-populate some unrelated userData to test attributes.hasUserData true
